key_themes: Significant resource expansion at Telfer (150% increase to 8Moz gold)
Strong March 2026 production (82,723oz gold) and cash build to $1.208bn
Havieron development progress and multi-decade mine life potential
Low discovery costs, operational beat vs forecasts, and sector re-rating
Institutional support (e.g. Wyloo stake increase) and strong balance sheet
summary: Greatland Resources (GGP.L / ASX:GGP), operator of the Telfer gold-copper mine and developer of Havieron, is seeing strongly positive sentiment after a landmark resource upgrade and robust quarterly results. The December 2025 resource statement expanded Telfer 150% to 8Moz gold (combined with Havieron ~14.9Moz Au and 645kt Cu) at very low discovery cost, while the March 2026 quarter delivered 82,723oz gold + 4,128t copper and lifted cash to $1.208 billion (up $260M).[[1]](https://www.proactiveinvestors.com/LON:GGP/Greatland-Resources-Ltd)[[2]](https://www.londonstockexchange.com/stock/GGP/greatland-resources-limited/company-page)[[1]](https://www.proactiveinvestors.com/LON:GGP/Greatland-Resources-Ltd) The stock has surged multiple times on the news, trading near 780p (market cap ~£5.2bn) with a strong 52-week gain from 230p lows amid gold sector tailwinds and positive analyst/investor commentary describing an 'embarrassment of riches' and Tier-1 asset value. Limited but bullish social media and chat discussion highlights operational momentum, though a few notes of technical caution exist after the run-up.[[3]](https://www.proactiveinvestors.com/companies/news/1089727/greatland-resources-shares-up-strongly-after-it-expands-telfer-gold-resource-by-150-1089727.html)[[4]](https://x.com/lux_davo/status/2044885479196139617)
sources: 10+ recent news articles and RNS announcements (production update, resource statement, holdings), 5+ relevant recent X posts from investors and analysts, LSE company page, Proactive Investors, company website, and share chat discussions
